name: jetpack-skill
description: Codex plugin for Jetpack and modern Android development skills.

interface.shortDescription: Jetpack and modern Android development guidance for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that packages skills and references for Jetpack, Android architecture, Compose, Navigation, lifecycle, and related modern Android development workflows.
defaultPrompt: Help me design a Jetpack Compose screen.
Review this Android architecture for Jetpack best practices.
Explain how to migrate this feature to modern Android APIs.
